title: Seniors enjoy fun walk on sunny Women's Day
description: GEORGE NEWS - Senior citizens showed up in...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Senior citizens showed up in large numbers for the Blue Ribbon Fun Walk in Thembalethu on Women's Day, enjoying getting out in the lovely sunny weather and the social aspect of the event.

George Mayor Jacqulique von Brandis joined the participants for the walk.

The Community Police Forum and ER24 were on stand-by.

George Mayor Jackie  von Brandis flanked by Ntombi Nyumbane (left, of Blue Ribbon) and Zandile Muteyi of Meals on Wheels. At the back is Mzunabile  Vanya of Blue Ribbon.

Warming up before the walk with Meals on Wheels gym instructor Mihlali Pieterson.

A large number of senior citizens showed up.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
